author: Anant Goel
name: Cache LM + LoRA TTT
blurb: Per-document LoRA TTT (rank-8 on Q/V/lm_head, Adam lr=0.01) + unigram cache LM (Grave et al. 2017). Explores cache language model interpolation as novel eval-time technique. Cache LM gave negative result (lambda=0.02 hurts on diverse web text), but LoRA TTT confirms -0.003 BPB. Trained 2000 steps on 1xA100 (1/10th budget).
